title: Cosmos Constellation — proximity network background
title_vi: Cosmos Graph · Constellation — mạng sao trôi (Ra ở tâm, cạnh phát sáng, xung chạy; hover sáng hàng xóm, kéo để xoay)
summary: A field of drifting nodes that link with glowing lines whenever they come close, forming a living constellation network in the Cosmos accents. Pure Canvas 2D, zero deps, runs offline; deterministic and seamless.
usage_notes: RUN: double-click index.html. Each node drifts on a periodic sine path (position = base + amp*sin(2pi*u*k+phase)) so the whole field loops; every frame any two nodes closer than DIST are joined by an additive line whose alpha fades with distance, and nodes are drawn as soft radial glows. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 + window.__seek(t) renders exact frames. TUNE: node count, DIST, AC colours, drift amp.
summary_vi: Đồ thị mạng sao trôi nhẹ: Ra ở tâm + node ký ức/card, cạnh phát sáng và xung chạy dọc. Hover 1 node để sáng hàng xóm; kéo để xoay cả chòm. Canvas 2D tự chứa.
notes: Graph effect sample (Ra) for the diary-view Graph facet. repo cosmos-akashic-effects/web-templates/diary-concepts/graph-effects/1-constellation.html
